documentation.description:
Status of AP_Limits. Sent in extended status stream when AP_Limits is
enabled.

record_types.name: Limits_Status

fields.name: Last_Trigger
fields.description:
Units: [ms]
Time (since boot) of last breach.

fields.name: Last_Action
fields.description:
Units: [ms]
Time (since boot) of last recovery action.

fields.name: Last_Recovery
fields.description:
Units: [ms]
Time (since boot) of last successful recovery.

fields.name: Last_Clear
fields.description:
Units: [ms]
Time (since boot) of last all-clear.

True if x25crc is valid for the message.
